title: Cube Cavern Recrafted +
description: A one-click install modpack for the CC:RD Minecraft Server.
body:
# Introduction

CC:RD is based on the once popular Roblox experience known as Cube Cavern created by zKevin and ClicheChloe in 2011, the game was later made private by zKevin. If you are interested in the original experience, is a version of the game from 2016 fixed to work on modern Roblox uploaded by ClicheChloe in 2021 which can be found [here](https://www.roblox.com/games/6907620011/Just-Cube-Cavern) however the game is no longer receiving updates.

CC:RD is a recreation of Cube Cavern in Minecraft, developed and hosted on a server by Geo. The project was started a few years ago and has gained some traction over time, and the project is still being worked on. If you want to join the project/server then click [here](https://discord.gg/hY7U9jmCy3) to join the Discord server.

## The Modpack

The CC:RD+ modpack was created to make playing CC:RD more immersive, and with extra options such as controller support and shader support to enhance the experience further. The pack will usually include performance enhancing mods, mods that add quality of life enhancements, and mods that add extra features not found in the vanilla experience.

> _Note: This modpack is not designed for use outside of CC:RD_
